message:
Command `
# DRT2 now past groups and reading guides (1.1KB pipe log vs 69KB from DRT1)
# Much faster this time! CPU 21m26s after groups phase (5min elapsed)
# Track assignment should complete soon, then actual routing iterations

for i in $(seq 1 180); do
    sleep 30
    ORPID=$(ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}' | head -1)
    [ -z "$ORPID" ] && echo "[$(date +%H:%M:%S)] OpenROAD exited!" && break
    CPUTIME=$(ps -p $ORPID -o cputime= 2>/dev/null)
    PIPEBYTES=$(wc -c < /tmp/drt2_pipe.log 2>/dev/null)
    LATESTMSG=$(tail -2 /tmp/drt2_pipe.log 2>/dev/null | tail -1 | cut -c1-80)
    RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
    FINAL=$([ -d "$RUN_DIR/final" ] && echo "YES" || echo "no")
    STEP71=$(ls "$RUN_DIR/71-openroad-detailedrouting/" 2>/dev/null | grep "odb\|drc" | head -3 | tr '\n' ',')
    echo "[$i $(date +%H:%M:%S)] CPU=$CPUTIME PIPE=${PIPEBYTES}B FINAL=$FINAL DRT71=$STEP71 | $LATESTMSG"
    [ "$FINAL" = "YES" ] && echo "=== FLOW COMPLETE ===" && break
done
` executed with exit code -1.

function.name: execute_bash

" timed out

# DRT2 now past groups and reading guides (1.1KB pipe log vs 69KB from DRT1)
